expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的板材尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总测量值，[BoardThick] 是顶板、底板和侧板的板材厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的板材厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total measurement, [BoardThick] is top, bottom and side board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is backboard material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan. [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi. [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total. [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan material papan atas, bawah, dan samping. [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan material papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้อย่างละเอียด [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผงบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผงหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể. [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên. [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat. Ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales ng itaas, ilalim at gilid na board. Ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales ng likod na board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: သင်တန်းအတွက်ဘုတ်များကိုရှင်းလင်းစွာတွက်မည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာခြင်းဖြစ်ပြီး, [BoardThick] သည် အပေါ်ဘုတ်, အောက်ဘုတ်နှင့် ဘေးဘုတ် ပစ္စည်းအထုနှင့် [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထုပေ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដុំបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ៖ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ជាចំនួនសរុប។ [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់នៃសម្ភារៈសំរាប់ដុំបន្ទះខាងលើ ខាងក្រោម និងចំហៀង។ [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់របស់សម្ភារៈសម្រាប់ដុំបន្ទះខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຂອງຄອງປ່າສໍາລັບຕູ້: [Width], [Height], [Depth] ເປັນຂະຫນາດທັ້ງຫມົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດສະດຸແຜ່ນເທິງ, ລຸ່ມ ແລະດ້ານເຂັ້ມ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດສະດຸແຜ່ນດ້ານຫລັງ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は全体の寸法を表し、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、側板の材料厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背板の材料厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛에 필요한 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이고, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단, 측면 보드의 재료 두께를 나타내며, [BackBoardThick]는 뒷 보드의 재료 두께를 나타냅니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total. [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral. [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les mesures totales. [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur des matériaux des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux. [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ist die Gesamtmessung. [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Ober-, Unter- und Seitenplatten. [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड का आकार गणना करें। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल मापन है। [BoardThick] ऊपरी, निचली और साइड बोर्ड की सामग्री मोटाई है। [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड की सामग्री मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры. [BoardThick] — толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковых панелей. [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала для задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
